_comment: EXAMPLE / DEMO — demonstrates the two optional next/ attribute+profile facets added alongside 'constraints': 'quality' (FR-SDC2, OPC-UA StatusCode propagation policy) and 'semantics' (FR-SDC3, IRI grounding for KG-Builder enrichment). NOT canonical and NOT a live profile — it is a worked example that VALIDATES against next/validation/machine-profile-schema.json so the facets are demonstrated, not merely 'allowed'. The facets are OPTIONAL everywhere; absent = legacy behaviour. See next/README.md (facets 2 + 3) and next/examples/README.md (Golden Rule).
description: Minimal machine TYPE that shows the optional 'quality' and 'semantics' facets on attributes, and a profile-level 'semantics' IRI. Each facet form is exercised: quality.onBad (drop|flag|hold) + nullFlavor; semantics as a single CURIE, as an array, and as the object form ({ $ref, sameAs, label }).

attributes.name: Act_Ref_ProductionOrder
attributes.description: No facets here on purpose — shows that 'quality' and 'semantics' are fully optional and may be omitted per attribute.
